name: briefing-toolkit
description: Daily morning brief across your connected tools — read-only fan-out over Slack / Asana / Notion / GitHub / Gmail / Google Calendar / Drive into a PDB-style briefing plus a zero-omission, link-rich action table that accumulates day-over-day for continuity analysis. ⚠️ Claude Code CLI — uses whichever of these MCP servers you have connected; degrades gracefully when some are absent.
